notes: v0.56.0: FAIL-CLOSED auto-updater — a preflight version mismatch now ABORTS + reverts to the rollback image instead of relaunching the wrong binary (fixes 'reports vX, expected vY — relaunching anyway'). Aether bootstrap no longer spams stderr off-server (Epsilon-only dir; SIGIL_AETHER_DIR override; skip silently when absent). Update toast surfaces build provenance (manifest flux_rev vs running FLUX_REV). Folds in the LANE-C GPU thermal guard (nvidia-smi >=85C -> CPU fallback) the 0.55.0 binary missed. Both linux-x64 and windows-x64 published at 0.56.0.
